name: com.nexoider.coreaiunity
description: Unity layer for CoreAI: единый MEAI pipeline, CoreAISettingsAsset, LLM backend switching, WorldCommand tool, CoreAi singleton API, Control API (StopAgent, ClearContext, OnToolExecuted), ForcedToolMode (deterministic tool selection). Depends on com.nexoider.coreai 0.25.0+.
